author: y4rr
content: Causal LM real-artifact harness landed. Chose SmolLM-135M (HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM-135M, Apache 2.0, Llama architecture, tied embeddings). Pinned to ferrotorch/smollm-135m (SHA c7a387d6). Harness verify_causal_lm_inference.py mirrors vision pattern. cargo test wrapper conformance_pretrained_causal_lm gated on --ignored. PASS first-try: top1_argmax=100% across full sequence, top5_overlap=5/5 at last token, max_abs=0.0001.
